overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2045 Term Treasury ETF (IBGB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE 2045 Maturity US Treasury index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds maturing between January and December 2045. The fund will terminate in December 2045. IBGB was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
